feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Threshold of the Void
entry.summary:
Author: Infernos

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,585Chapters: 3/20Kudos: 5

Summary: The Druid Council needs Stiles's help. Eight hundred years ago, druids made a catastrophic mistake, creating Tairseach Folús, a dimensional entity that feeds on supernatural life force. After devastating losses, seventeen druids sacrificed themselves to create a prison outside of our reality where the creature would be contained forever. Seventy-five years ago, a rogue druid discovered records of the prison and relocated it, anchoring it to the ley lines beneath San Francisco, where it began to degrade. The Councils formed a coalition with other supernaturals to reinforce the seals, but in this reality, those seals won't last. Now, a vengeful hunter family has allied with the druid's followers, and they intend to shatter the prison during the autumn equinox. Stiles has eighteen days to stop them and find a way to send Tairseach back where it came from, before it consumes every supernatural being on the West Coast

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Blood and Ashes
entry.summary:
Author: lavieboheme0919

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 89,575Chapters: 16/16Kudos: 48

Summary: Several centuries after the Last Battle, the White Tower stands taller than ever—rebuilt, restructured, and reeling from new threats that no one dares name aloud. Saidin has returned, cleansed and chaotic, and the Hall of the Tower seeks control more than balance. When Stiles—a powerful male channeler raised to Aes Sedai—survives a narrow vote in the Hall for flouting Tower law and custom, he’s spared gentling… but not punishment.Bound without consent to Sitters from opposing Ajahs, declared the first Striker since the Age of Legends, Stiles finds himself weaponized by a Tower that fears what it cannot command. But Stiles is not their dog to tame, and the Tower is not as united as it pretends to be. As ancient tensions simmer and forgotten enemies stir, bonds—both sacred and profane—will be tested.This is not the story of the Dragon. This is what comes after.Power without trust. Bonds without love. And one man who will burn down the Pattern before letting them leash him again.Note: There will be some AI-generated art for an important moment from each chapter at the end of each chapter.

entry.title: Wolfy
entry.summary:
Author: 2005Snow2012

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 815Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 16

Summary: The story of a boy and its wolf: When he was young, Stiles had a furry best friend who hid into the woods. This is the story of a child and its wolfy Of childhood and happiness Of growing up and letting go

entry.title: overwhelm as i approach
entry.summary:
Author: sparassiss

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,051Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 9

Summary: “What happened?” Stiles is right in his space now, and Derek wants nothing else. He can’t help but reach out, wrapping both arms around Stiles’ waist, clinging on tight and burying his face in Stiles’ neck, where it’s warm, where it’s safe. Stiles clings back, his own arms coming up immediately and gripping onto Derek’s back with one, the other hand cupping Derek’s skull protectively. A hint of sourness comes through his scent, his anxiety for Derek, and Derek only shakes his head in response and clings on tighter. -Or, Derek’s had enough of the daily pain, and slightly crashes out.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Name of Love Teen Wolf/Criminal Minds
entry.summary:
Author: Fantastic_writer06

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,972Chapters: 18/?Kudos: 145

Summary: Ruby Martin, Stiles Stilinski and Derek Hale move to Washington D.C. After a robbery gone wrong, the pack decides Ruby and Stiles need a change of scenery and contacted Ben Greenwood, director of the FBI to accept the spots he offered. Ready to find out how it goes when Ruby and Stiles become the new co-heads of the new Supernatural Crimes Division, relationships are made and ended, new friends and maybe some old ones popping upRuby Martin x Aaron HotchnerDerek Hale x Stiles Stilisnki

entry.title: Save Point
entry.summary:
Author: TheThirdChild

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,435Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 71

Summary: Stiles is determined to give Derek the perfect anniversary gift—the kind that proves he truly sees him. That somehow resulted in time travel and a surprise encounter with the Hale Pack pre-everything. Now he has to gather insight, avoid suspicion, and absolutely not rewrite history. Derek wanted something meaningful, but this might be too meaningful. Perfect gift status: pending.

entry.title: a problem that doesn't want to be solved
entry.summary:
Author: wishingonalightningbolt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,448Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 169

Summary: Derek is an executive at Hale Publishing. Stiles is his assistant—his assistant who's 23 years younger than him. So Derek really shouldn't...notice him. The way that he does. -0- Stiles is attractive. Derek knows that. He’s not blind. Sometimes, not often, Derek finds himself—looking. Admiring. Stiles is tall and fit, broad shoulders that taper to a trim waist, an ass that Derek shouldn’t be checking out as often as he does, firm and high. Derek isn’t ignorant to his own fluid sexuality. He used to fuck men, back in the day, when he was twenty and single and easy. But then he was with Jennifer, and since the divorce it’s just seemed…less complicated. To date women. But he likes men—aesthetically. Sexually. He likes Stiles more than he should. And it’s weird not because he’s a man but because Derek has literally never had this problem before. He’s never been attracted to one of his assistants, ever. Then again, none of his assistants have been anything like Stiles.

entry.title: Fated Connections
entry.summary:
Author: Zelena_Feya

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,505Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 25

Summary: Stiles has had enough of terrible dates. When his best friend Scott introduces him to Fated Connections, a matchmaking service for werewolves and humans, Stiles figures he has nothing to lose. He certainly isn't prepared to meet Derek Hale—a successful, intensely private werewolf who's been searching for a genuine partner.Their chemistry is immediate and undeniable, especially when Derek catches Stiles's scent and his entire demeanor shifts. One dinner date later, Stiles is falling hard, and Derek isn't letting him go anytime soon.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski

  • Derek Hale

entry.title: Deny and Obey
entry.summary:
Author: mee4ever

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,739Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 122

Summary: “You need an anchor,” Derek tells him when Stiles lies on his back, panting, naked, on the forest floor.Stiles snorts. Pain and starvation are the only two things that have worked at all, but neither keeps him human for long. “No shit, asshole.” Not like he’s tried to find something to hold onto his humanity every time he’s managed to drag himself back into human form. Stiles sucks in a breath and braces when he feels himself slipping. Then Derek digs his claws into his thigh. Stiles screams murder but Derek ignores him. “Pain,” he says as he hovers over Stiles while kneeling beside him, “isn’t the best anchor, but at least it is one.”  Or the one where Derek turns Stiles to save his life, and they leave Beacon hills to figure it all out, but they're shit at communicating.

entry.title: Only The Beginning
entry.summary:
Author: Zarha24

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,167Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 19

Summary: “I’m sorry-” Derek begins before he’s interrupted by a growl from Erica and very few words from Stiles. “Don’t you dare.” It’s cold and empty, gaining whines from all the betas even Peter oddly enough. “Get out if you're going to apologize, I don't need it because to me they're all empty no matter how true they may be.” It’s still cold but with a deep sadness rather than anger. “I want you.” Derek spoke softly as Stiles seemed to freeze. “In the pack with me, with us. Please?” He sounded desperate and like a man lost to his yearning. “And my pups? They are wanted too?” He needs to be sure because he’d only join for their sake and no one else. “Yes, they are wanted. Can you please look at me?” Derek sounds needy by this point, definitely not his usual alpha tone or even body language Stiles finds as he finally looks at the man. “Alright, fine.” He agrees, with a softer, more gentle tone that speaks volumes for how he feels.

entry.title: Yellow Paper Daisy
entry.summary:
Author: Babysterek

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 77,487Chapters: 23/25Kudos: 159

Summary: “Well,” Peter says at last, forcing a crooked smile into his voice, “at least this time he didn’t almost get us all killed.”Derek swallows. His throat is dry, the words scraping on the way out. “I was drunk.” They land and disappear without effect.Talia turns then, her gaze settling on him fully. It’s steady, unreadable, and it makes his shoulders tense despite himself. “You were careless,” she says. “You are a werewolf, and if you got drunk, you laced it with wolfsbane, you did it. Do you understand, In twenty-four years, every scandal has had the same root. You. At some point, it stops being bad luck and becomes character. And I am tired of pretending this is something that merely happens to you.”---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------Derek just wanted a moment of quiet. Instead, he crosses a line with the last person he should trust.....old grudges, bad decisions and a mistake he keeps repeating. "He learned the shape of the poison once,from a woman who wore it like skin.Now hemlock blooms in his own hands,and he cannot tell where she ends and he begins. "

entry.title: Run Boy Run
entry.summary:
Author: myswordhandissinging

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,210Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 822

Summary: Stiles Stilinski knew he should have stayed in to finish his assignment that was due on Monday. Instead, he had to go investigate with the pack. He knew he was going to regret it later, and he probably should have listened to his instincts. When he goes missing, the pack finds him in the same spot after days of searching.   Or the one where Stiles goes missing for a couple of days and comes back blind and with magical powers. What did that bitch do to him?   *This was first published in 2013 as a teenager. Now, as an adult with a developed frontal lobe, the age difference between Derek and Stiles is only 2 years, with Stiles as an 18-year-old high school senior and Derek being 20-years-old.

entry.title: Neal's Therapist
entry.summary:
Author: Tankeika

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 44,678Chapters: 7/8Kudos: 12

Summary: Neal Caffrey is picked up from prison by Peter to begin their work together. It goes well, at first. Until a few weeks in when Neal makes a run for it for the first time, cutting his anklet, unknowingly giving the now divorced, Peter Burke, the perfect opportunity to finally enact his long awaited plan. For those here for the Derek/Stiles tag, they're not in the story yet, but I promise, they will be, and I will put it in the chapter notes when they're introduced. It will be worth it, so if you're here for that, I appreciate your patience!!!

entry.title: Dying In Love
entry.summary:
Author: amatorial

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,144Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 76

Summary: After dropping out of his FBI internship, Stiles returned to Beacon Hills, struggling to outgrow the version of himself high school forced him to become. He wasn't sure what he was doing with his life, but he kept busy among the shelves at The Reading Nook, letting the quiet and routine distract him from the memories. And then Derek Hale walked in. Derek being in his life again stirred a hunger inside Stiles, a wanting that consumed him whole. It left him breathless, filled with a love so fierce it clawed at his chest and threatened to tear him apart inside.

entry.title: La-la-La Liberated
entry.summary:
Author: Definitively_Different_Drivel

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,194Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 64

Summary: Stiles still seemed confused. "I don't get why you look so upset. I thought you'd be happy." "Happy." Derek bit out. "Yeah. You can stick around again. No more smelling shitty pinning Stiles. No more pack meetings where I make everything awkward. No more, you know, clumsy asinine attempts at flirting and friendship. No more dancing around the elephant in the room. The elephant has officially been put down. Dead and buried. No more elephants." Derek swallowed hard. "What if I told you I didn't actually dislike that elephant?" "I wouldn't believe you. Look, I get it if this hurts your ego, but you gotta get over yourself. Look on the sunny side of life, you know?" In which an accidental blood offering to the fae results in a boon that removes all those pesky emotions regarding Derek. The boon is permanent unless removed before Stiles falls in love again. With a strange suitor sucking up Stiles' attention, will Derek solve the puzzle in time, or will Stiles fall in love and forever be incapable of feeling when Derek is on his mind?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Looking for a Cure
entry.summary:
Author: Littleplutodefender

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 981Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 83

Summary: “It’s not my fault you got kidnapped, sti-” His voice lacks any conviction, but I cut him off nonetheless. I’d like to say I didn’t let my anger get the best of me, but I practically growl when I cut him off.“I was stabbed ten times, Scott. Ten goddamn times. Do you know how long it takes to stab someone ten times?”---Stiles got kidnapped and Scott wasn't there to save him.

entry.title: all the things we didn't say (all the answers i wish i gave you)
entry.summary:
Author: prettea

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,885Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 28

Summary: "It was almost impressive how much blood the human body contained—five to six liters, according to his biology textbook. Roughly the same amount needed to fill a scooter’s gas tank. Stiles hazily wondered if Derek would reach out. The teen felt his hand slip from where it had been pressed against his side. He couldn’t tell whether it was the blood making his grip too slick, or if his strength was simply giving out. Stiles egoistically hoped Derek would come to his funeral." or: Stiles gets hurt. Badly. or: Derek is worried, and like the responsible adult he is, he ignores it.
